headline: Energous shares are trading higher after the company announced continued commercial momentum across its enterprise customer base, including expanding deployments with its two Fortune 10 customers, and a growing proof-of-concept pipeline spanning multiple industries and geographies.
summary: Energous shares are trading higher after the company announced continued commercial momentum across its enterprise customer base, including expanding deployments with its two Fortune 10 customers, and a growing proof-of-concept pipeline spanning multiple industries and geographies.

headline: Caterpillar is well positioned amid higher domestic factory production, says Melius' Rob Wertheimer
summary: Rob Wertheimer, Melius Research, joins 'The Exchange' to discuss the Wertheimer's thoughts on Caterpillar.

headline: Insights Into Cummins (CMI) Q1: Wall Street Projections for Key Metrics
summary: Besides Wall Street's top-and-bottom-line estimates for Cummins (CMI), review projections for some of its key metrics to gain a deeper understanding of how the company might have fared during the quarter ended March 2026.
